context.summary: The controller needs a new bounded review ticket.

ticket.title: Review Tau handoff contract ergonomics
ticket.body: Review whether the compact Tau handoff is easier for agents to produce reliably.

requested_work: Run contract validators and review the compact authoring schema.
rationale: The harness needs an agent-friendly front-door contract before runtime orchestration.

next_agent.name: reviewer
next_agent.reason: This is a read-only validation task.

stop_condition: Reviewer posts PASS, NEEDS_CHANGES, BLOCKED, or INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE.
